source_of_truth: TokenBeep 主仓 docs/features/62_KOL策略市场/SPEC_策略工件与统一执行契约.md §17.2
note: KernelState snapshot round-trip conformance vectors (Feature 62-3): each case's snapshot must satisfy to_snapshot(from_snapshot(snapshot)) == snapshot byte-for-byte (decimal128 context, §17.2 编解码往返必须逐位保真). Shared across Server/Connector/Provider re-implementations. position.opened_at is epoch MILLISECONDS (§17.2) -- a genuine 13-digit value, not a small offset, so a seconds/milliseconds unit confusion in a re-implementation fails this fixture immediately instead of passing by coincidence (2026-07-19 Codex P1 review).

cases.name: all_null_minimal_state
cases.description: First-tick initial_state() shape: no position, no pending_entry, no prior exit, zero closed trades.

cases.name: non_null_position_and_pending_entry_with_nullable_subfields
cases.description: position present with stop_loss=null (open-ended stop) and take_profit set; pending_entry present with stop_value set and take_value=null; both position/pending_entry exercise their own exactly-N-key nullable subfields independently.

cases.name: decimal128_boundary_value_round_trip
cases.description: Decimal fields at the decimal128 (prec=34) precision boundary -- 34 significant digits with no trailing-zero stripping opportunity (1/3 under _DECIMAL_CONTEXT), including a negated boundary value, must survive to_snapshot/from_snapshot/to_snapshot unchanged (§17.2 逐位保真 hard requirement).
